prompt: Build an NFT contract in my SE-2 project with on-chain SVG metadata, minting with a price, and a gallery page to display minted NFTs.
assertions: Uses OpenZeppelin v5 ERC-721 contract (import from @openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC721/)
Implements on-chain SVG metadata via tokenURI returning base64-encoded JSON with SVG image
Minting requires payment (msg.value >= mintPrice or similar)
Gallery page displays minted NFTs with their SVG images
Uses _update override for transfer customization (not _beforeTokenTransfer which was removed in v5)
Proper Hardhat deploy script exists in packages/hardhat/deploy/
Frontend uses SE-2 hooks (useScaffoldReadContract/useScaffoldWriteContract) for contract interaction
Token ID counter is managed correctly (no off-by-one errors)
Contract compiles successfully (valid Solidity syntax and imports)
NFT metadata JSON includes required fields: name, description, image
